payload.query: mutation($code: String!, $name: String!, $description: String!, $type: ChargeType!, $resolution: ChargeResolution!, $validFrom: DateTime!, $vat: Boolean!) { createCharge(input: { code: $code, name: $name, description: $description, type: $type, resolution: $resolution, validFrom: $validFrom, vat: $vat }) { boolean } }
